translations.en: I like to cook on weekends.
translations.es: Me gusta cocinar los fines de semana.
translations.it: Mi piace cucinare nel fine settimana.
translations.pt: Gosto de cozinhar nos fins de semana.
translations.vi: Tôi thích nấu ăn vào cuối tuần.
translations.ar: أحب الطبخ في عطلة نهاية الأسبوع.
translations.nl: Ik kook graag in het weekend.
translations.hi: मुझे सप्ताहांत में खाना बनाना पसंद है.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει να μαγειρεύω τα σαββατοκύριακα.
translations.nb: Jeg liker å lage mat i helgene.
translations.id: Saya suka memasak saat akhir pekan.
translations.sv: Jag gillar att laga mat på helgerna.
translations.ro: Îmi place să gătesc în weekend.
translations.da: Jeg kan godt lide at lave mad i weekenderne.
translations.ja: 週末は料理をするのが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular.
Modal adverb expressing liking/preference; modifies the verb.
Contraction of an + dem; preposition used for time expressions; governs dative.
Neuter noun; here dative singular as the temporal complement of 'am'.

sentences.target: Sie liest abends gern im Bett.

translations.de: Sie liest abends gern im Bett.
translations.en: She likes to read in bed in the evenings.
translations.es: Le gusta leer en la cama por las noches.
translations.fr: Elle aime lire au lit le soir.
translations.it: Le piace leggere a letto la sera.
translations.ko: 저녁에는 침대에서 책 읽는 걸 좋아해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 她晚上喜欢在床上看书。
translations.yue: 佢夜晚鍾意喺床上睇書。
translations.ru: Она любит по вечерам читать в постели.
translations.pt: Ela gosta de ler na cama à noite.
translations.vi: Cô ấy thích đọc sách trên giường vào buổi tối.
translations.ar: هي تحب القراءة في السرير مساءً.
translations.nl: Ze leest ’s avonds graag in bed.
translations.uk: Вона ввечері любить читати в ліжку.
translations.hi: वह शाम को बिस्तर में पढ़ना पसंद करती है.
translations.pl: Ona lubi wieczorami czytać w łóżku.
translations.el: Της αρέσει να διαβάζει στο κρεβάτι τα βράδια.
translations.nb: Hun liker å lese i sengen om kvelden.
translations.id: Dia suka membaca di tempat tidur pada malam hari.
translations.sv: Hon gillar att läsa i sängen på kvällarna.
translations.ro: Îi place să citească în pat seara.
translations.da: Hun kan godt lide at læse i sengen om aftenen.
translations.ja: 彼女は夜、ベッドで本を読むのが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative (also ambiguous with formal 'Sie'); subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; stem vowel alternation e→ie.
Temporal adverb indicating habitual time.
Modal adverb expressing liking/preference; modifies the verb.
Contraction of in + dem; preposition for static location; governs dative.
Neuter noun; dative singular as object of the preposition 'in' (location).

sentences.target: Wir helfen dir gern bei den Hausaufgaben.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈhɛlfn̩ diːɐ̯ gɛʁn baɪ̯ deːn ˈhaʊ̯sʔaʊ̯fˌɡaːbn̩./

translations.de: Wir helfen dir gern bei den Hausaufgaben.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈhɛlfn̩ diːɐ̯ gɛʁn baɪ̯ deːn ˈhaʊ̯sʔaʊ̯fˌɡaːbn̩./
translations.en: We’re happy to help you with homework.
translations.es: Con gusto te ayudamos con la tarea.
translations.fr: Nous sommes contents de t’aider avec tes devoirs.
translations.it: Siamo felici di aiutarti con i compiti.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们很乐意帮你做作业。
translations.yue: 我哋好樂意幫你做功課。
translations.ru: Мы с радостью поможем тебе с домашним заданием.
translations.pt: Estamos felizes em ajudar com a lição de casa.
translations.he: אנחנו שמחים לעזור לך בשיעורי הבית.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi sẵn lòng giúp bạn làm bài tập về nhà.
translations.ar: نحن سعداء بمساعدتك في الواجبات المنزلية.
translations.nl: We helpen je graag met je huiswerk.
translations.uk: Ми раді допомогти тобі з домашнім завданням.
translations.hi: हम खुशी से तुम्हारे होमवर्क में मदद करेंगे.
translations.pl: Chętnie pomożemy ci z zadaniem domowym.
translations.el: Χαιρόμαστε να σε βοηθήσουμε με τα μαθήματά σου.
translations.nb: Vi hjelper deg gjerne med lekser.
translations.id: Kami senang membantu kamu dengan pekerjaan rumah.
translations.sv: Vi hjälper dig gärna med läxorna.
translations.ro: Suntem bucuroși să te ajutăm cu temele.
translations.cs: Rádi ti pomůžeme s domácími úkoly.
translations.da: Vi hjælper dig gerne med lektierne.
translations.ja: 宿題を喜んで手伝います。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person plural; selects a dative object.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular dative; indirect object required by 'helfen'.
Modal adverb expressing willingness/liking; modifies the verb.
Preposition taking dative; indicates assistance in/with a task.
Definite article, dative plural, agreeing with the following plural noun.
Plural noun (assignments); dative plural as the complement of 'bei'.

sentences.target: Lukas spielt gern Fußball im Park.

translations.de: Lukas spielt gern Fußball im Park.
translations.en: Lukas likes to play soccer in the park.
translations.es: A Lukas le gusta jugar al fútbol en el parque.
translations.fr: Lukas aime jouer au foot au parc.
translations.it: A Lukas piace giocare a calcio al parco.
translations.zh-Hans: 卢卡斯喜欢在公园踢足球。
translations.ru: Лукас любит играть в футбол в парке.
translations.pt: Lukas gosta de jogar futebol no parque.
translations.vi: Lukas thích đá bóng ở công viên.
translations.ar: لوكاس يحب لعب كرة القدم في الحديقة.
translations.nl: Lukas speelt graag voetbal in het park.
translations.uk: Лукас любить грати у футбол у парку.
translations.hi: लुकास को पार्क में फुटबॉल खेलना पसंद है.
translations.pl: Lukas lubi grać w piłkę nożną w parku.
translations.el: Ο Λούκας αγαπά να παίζει ποδόσφαιρο στο πάρκο.
translations.nb: Lukas liker å spille fotball i parken.
translations.id: Lukas suka bermain sepak bola di taman.
translations.sv: Lukas gillar att spela fotboll i parken.
translations.ro: Lui Lukas îi place să joace fotbal în parc.
translations.cs: Lukas rád hraje fotbal v parku.
translations.da: Lukas kan godt lide at spille fodbold i parken.
translations.ja: ルーカスは公園でサッカーをするのが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Proper noun; nominative singular subject.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular.
Modal adverb expressing preference; modifies the verb.
Masculine noun; accusative singular as the direct object of 'spielen'.
Contraction of in + dem; preposition for static location; governs dative.
Masculine noun; dative singular as the object of 'in' indicating location.
